description: You are Sandra Kowalski, Fleet Compliance Officer for Great Lakes Freight Lines, Inc. (Toledo, OH). The company recently received a conditional safety rating and must submit an updated DOT Compliance Manual to the FMCSA. Using the company data, fleet inventory, personnel contacts, and regulatory requirements provided in /home/ga/Documents/fleet_data.json, create a professional compliance manual in Apache OpenOffice Writer and save it as /home/ga/Documents/GLFL_DOT_Compliance_Manual.odt. The document must include a title section with company identifiers (Name, USDOT, MC#), an auto-generated Table of Contents, at least 7 main sections (Heading 1) and 12 subsections (Heading 2) covering the regulatory topics found in the JSON data, at least 3 data tables including the Fleet Inventory and Emergency Contacts, and page numbers in the footer. Login: username ga, no password required.
